meaning: n.<美>(粗磨)玉米粉,其他谷物磨的粉,<苏格兰>(燕)麦片
examples: Cornmeal mush Geppetto had a very bad temper.
There are carrots, eggs and cornmeal.
He crams his ducks with cornmeal every day.
Then she gently flattened them with an open palm and dusted the rounds with cornmeal.
Cornmeal can range from a fine flour to a grind as coarse as Kosher salt.
